DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joan Kruckewitt, propria persona, defendant and moving party.
*Appearance moving party and no opposition filed, the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT JOAN KRUCKEWITT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- demurrer sustained without leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Reporter: Candice Yount, CSR #2737 (DEW/301)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court denied DEFENDANT JOAN KRUCKEWITT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS. Defendant has 5 days leave from service of this order to answer or otherwise respond. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
